Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.stream

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.redis.stream

Packages that use org.springframework.data.redis.stream
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.stream
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.stream used by org.springframework.data.redis.stream
    Class
    Description
    Cancelable
    Cancelable allows stopping long-running tasks and freeing underlying resources.
    StreamListener
    Listener interface to receive delivery of messages.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer
    Abstraction used by the framework representing a message listener container.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.ConsumerStreamReadRequest
    Request to read a Redis Stream with a Consumer.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.ConsumerStreamReadRequestBuilder
    Builder to build a StreamMessageListenerContainer.ConsumerStreamReadRequest.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions
    Options for StreamMessageListenerContainer.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptionsBuilder
    Builder for StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequest
    Request to read a Redis Stream.
    StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequestBuilder
    Builder to build a StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequest.
    StreamReceiver
    A receiver to consume Redis Streams using reactive infrastructure.
    StreamReceiver.StreamReceiverOptions
    Options for StreamReceiver.
    StreamReceiver.StreamReceiverOptionsBuilder
    Builder for StreamReceiver.StreamReceiverOptions.
    Subscription
    The Subscription is the link to the actual running Task.
    Task.State
    The Task.State defining the lifecycle phase the actual Task.
